title: Bachelor of Theology
description: A comprehensive four-year program designed to provide students with a deep understanding of biblical truths, Reformed doctrine, and original languages.
fullDescription: The Bachelor of Theology (B.Th.) is PBSI's premier academic track for those entering full-time ministry. It focuses on the primary sources of Christian faith, requiring students to master the biblical languages of Greek and Hebrew for faithful interpretation and preaching.
objectives: Attain proficiency in Greek and Hebrew exegesis.
Formulate a coherent systematic theology based on Reformed traditions.
Develop expository preaching skills for local church ministry.
Understand the global history of the Church from the Apostles to today.
admissionRequirements: Pastoral Recommendation from a local church
Successful interview with the Academic Dean
